statement: A beam AB (length 6 m) is supported by a pin at A (x=0), a pin at C (x=3 m), and a roller at B (x=6 m). A downward load of 600 N acts at x=4.5 m. The beam is weightless. Find the reactions. (Note: this beam is statically indeterminate.)
common_student_errors: Attempting to solve the 4 unknowns (Ax, Ay, Cy, By) with only 3 equilibrium equations without recognizing the system is indeterminate
Dropping one support to make the problem determinate without justification
Confusing static indeterminacy with the problem being unsolvable (it requires compatibility/deflection equations)
